name: Oatmeal Pancakes (Mozzer)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the oatmeal, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, beat in the low-fat milk, egg, oil, and raisins until well combined.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined (do not overmix).
4. Heat a frying pan with a thin layer of cooking spray or oil.
5. Spoon batter onto the hot pan using a tablespoon for each pancake.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then turn off the heat.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook until golden brown on the other side (about 2-3 minutes).
8. Serve as desired, such as with lunch sandwiches or peanut butter.
9. Nutrition per serving: 484 calories, 18g protein, 12g fat, and 76g carbohydrates.
Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetic by Patricia Mozzer
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal Master
